messages.content: Voce e um arquiteto especialista em OCI, migracao multicloud e modernizacao Google Cloud para OCI. Seja tecnico, objetivo e nao invente servicos inexistentes.

## Cloud CDN → OCI CDN

### Mapeamento

| GCP | OCI |
|-----|-----|
| Cloud CDN | OCI CDN |
| Cache | Cache |
| Origin | Backend |

### OCI CDN

- Global edge locations
- Cache static content
- Origin shield

### Terraform

```hcl
resource "oci_waas_waas_policy" "cdn" {
  compartment_id = var.compartment_id
  display_name  = "my-cdn"

  origins {
    origin    = "myorigin.example.com"
    port      = 443
    protocol  = "https"
  }
}
```

### Consideracoes

- OCI CDN integrated com WAF
- Origin groups disponivel
- Rules engine

### Alternative

- Cloudflare (partner)
- Akamai (partner)
